name: PFCommandBar
description: Stable command surface exposing primary workspace actions.
responsibility: Expose primary workspace commands in a stable and predictable location.

requirements: Commands must be keyboard reachable in a predictable order.
Search and filter controls require labels or accessible names.
Busy states must not hide available actions without explanation.

anti_patterns: mixing unrelated workspace actions into one bar
burying critical actions among secondary controls
icon-only command groups without accessible labels
